overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark grassland at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The camera moves steadily along a dirt path surrounded by tall grass and distant trees, with no other characters or vehicles present. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, featuring realistic but synthetic lighting and textures.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous first-person walk through an open grassland at night. The flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass, with scattered rocks visible on the ground. Distant trees form dark silhouettes on the horizon against the clear night sky. No other agents or significant events occur during the steady forward movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression through a desolate grassland under the cover of night. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to reveal a narrow dirt path flanked by dense, tall grass. As the camera moves forward, the beam of light catches scattered rocks embedded in the soil, emphasizing the rugged texture of the ground. The scene then expands toward the horizon, where the silhouettes of distant trees emerge against a clear, starless sky before the steady walk continues deeper into the open landscape.
